specific_question: In Q2 2025, how many Elexion mid-range EVs were returned for interior accessory defects during the first 90 days of ownership?
answer: Company warranty tracking indicates that 42 mid-range Elexion EVs were returned in Q2 2025 due to interior accessory defects within the first 90 days of ownership.
